title: the horrors in the fog
description: a horror mod pack that is spooky
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0b6c0a068fbd71ea8989bae1ee9e9be2be63a38.png)


a modpack that adds a bunch of horror mods that will make your game a thrilling exprince. 
_________________________________________________________________________________________
-content-
adds herobrine 
the man from the fog
the midnight lerker 
the better cave dweller
and adds other mods to help with prefomance and giving minecraft a horror paint over
and adds a map so you have at least one addvantage
_____________________________________________________________________________________
**the mod may have jumpscares**
**and loud effects**
_________________________________________________________

****if you want to be spooked, than this is the mod pack for you****
